hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Capybara in the wild
hero.caption: The Capybara is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.fileTitle: File:Yellow-headed caracara (Milvago chimachima) on capybara (Hydrochoeris hydrochaeris).JPG
habitat.alt: A Capybara navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Capybara finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Capybara.

baby.alt: A young or baby Capybara showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Capybaras must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.fileTitle: File:046 Capybara by the river in Encontro das Águas State Park Photo by Giles Laurent.jpg
family.alt: A group of Capybaras interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Capybaras interact with others of their species.

range.fileTitle: File:028 Capybara and Pink Ipê trees in Encontro das Águas State Park Photo by Giles Laurent.jpg
range.alt: A Capybara traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.alt: A photo showing the size of a Capybara
size.caption: The size of a Capybara can vary depending on its age and environment.

closeup.alt: A detailed close-up showing the physical features of a Capybara
closeup.caption: A close-up view reveals the intricate details of a Capybara's body.

fun-fact.alt: A Capybara showing a unique behavior or adaptation
fun-fact.caption: Did you know that the Capybara has amazing features that help it survive?
